title: HALO I: Photometric continuum reverberation mapping of Fairall~9
comment: 18 pages, 10 figures, 7 tables, accepted for publication in A\&A
summary: We investigate the origin of inter-band continuum time delays in active galactic nuclei (AGNs) to study the structure and properties of their accretion disks. We aim to measure the inter-band continuum time delays through photometric monitoring of Seyfert galaxy Fairall~9 to construct the lag-spectrum. Additionally, we explain the observed features in the Fairall~9 lag-spectrum and discuss the potential drivers behind them, based on our newly collected data from the Obserwatorium Cerro Murphy (OCM) telescope. We initiated a long-term, continuous AGN photometric monitoring program in 2024, titled 'Hubble constant constraints through AGN Light curve Observations' (HALO) using intermediate and broad band filters. Here, we present the first results from HALO, focusing on photometric light curves and continuum time-delay measurements for Fairall~9. To complement these observations and extend the wavelength coverage of the lag-spectrum, we also reanalyzed archival Swift light curves and spectroscopic data available in the literature. Using HALO and Swift light curves, we measured inter-band continuum delays to construct the lag-spectrum of Fairall~9. Excess lags appear in the $u$ and $U$ bands (Balmer continuum contamination) and in the $I$ band (Paschen jump/dust emission from the torus). Overall, the lag-spectrum deviates significantly from standard disk model predictions. We find that inter-band delays deviate from the power-law, $τ_λ \propto λ^β$ due to BLR scattering, reprocessing, and dust contributions at longer wavelengths. Power-law fits are therefore not well suited for characterizing the nature of the time delays.

AI.tldr: 通过AGN光变监测研究吸积盘结构，发现Fairall 9的延迟谱偏离标准盘模型，u/U波段和I波段存在额外延迟，延迟不遵循幂律分布。
AI.motivation: 研究活动星系核（AGN）连续谱波段间时间延迟的起源，以了解其吸积盘结构和性质，特别是通过测量Seyfert星系Fairall 9的延迟谱来探索这些特征背后的物理机制。
AI.method: 使用HALO项目（2024年启动的长期连续AGN光度监测计划）和重新分析的Swift档案数据，通过中间和宽带滤光片进行光度监测，测量波段间连续谱延迟以构建Fairall 9的延迟谱。
AI.result: 在u和U波段（巴尔末连续谱污染）以及I波段（帕邢跃变/尘埃发射）观察到额外延迟，整体延迟谱显著偏离标准盘模型预测，延迟不遵循幂律分布τ_λ ∝ λ^β。
AI.conclusion: 波段间延迟偏离幂律分布是由于宽线区散射、再处理和长波段的尘埃贡献，因此幂律拟合不适合表征时间延迟的性质，需要更复杂的模型来解释观测到的延迟谱特征。

title: First mapping of prebiotic molecule CH2NH in a pre-stellar core
summary: We present the first spatially resolved map of methanimine CH2NH in the prestellar core L1544 using the IRAM 30m telescope. The 2$_{0,2}$-1$_{0,1}$ line at 127 GHz was mapped with 20" resolution ($\sim$2800 au), revealing extended CH2NH emission across the core. The peak line intensity coincides with the well-known c-C3H2 peak, while the integrated intensity peaks between the HNCO and dust continuum peaks due to broader linewidths in the latter region. Column densities of CH2NH are $\sim$(0.5-1.4$\times$)10$^{12}$ cm$^{-2}$, corresponding to fractional abundances of $5\times10^{-11}$-$1\times10^{-10}$, with a trend decreasing from the southern, carbon-chain rich region to the dust and HNCO peak in the north. Comparison with complementary molecular maps and the gas-grain chemical model of Sipilä et al. suggests that neutral-neutral gas-phase reactions and dissociative recombination dominate in the outer carbon-chain shell. This study demonstrates that CH2NH, a simple nitrogen- and carbon-bearing molecule previously detected with pointed observations in other cold cores, is present and spatially extended in the evolved pre-stellar core L1544. This indicates that prebiotic nitrogen-carbon chemistry continues efficiently up to the onset of gravitational collapse, providing key constraints for astrochemical models and the early stages of chemical complexity leading to amino acids.

AI.tldr: 首次在L1544原恒星核心中绘制了甲亚胺(CH2NH)的空间分布图，发现其广泛分布且丰度从南到北递减，表明前生命氮碳化学在引力坍缩前持续高效进行。
AI.motivation: 研究简单含氮碳分子甲亚胺在演化中的原恒星核心L1544中的空间分布，以了解前生命化学在恒星形成早期阶段的演化过程。
AI.method: 使用IRAM 30米望远镜观测CH2NH的2_{0,2}-1_{0,1}谱线（127 GHz），空间分辨率20"（约2800天文单位），绘制了该分子在L1544核心的空间分布图。
AI.result: 发现CH2NH在核心中广泛分布，峰值强度与c-C3H2峰值重合，积分强度峰值位于HNCO和尘埃连续谱峰值之间。柱密度为(0.5-1.4)×10^{12} cm^{-2}，丰度为5×10^{-11}-1×10^{-10}，从南部富碳链区域到北部尘埃和HNCO峰值区域呈递减趋势。
AI.conclusion: CH2NH在演化中的原恒星核心L1544中存在且空间分布广泛，表明前生命氮碳化学在引力坍缩开始前仍高效进行，为天体化学模型和氨基酸形成早期阶段的化学复杂性提供了关键约束。

title: Fermionic versus Bosonic Dark Matter in Neutron Stars: A Bayesian Study with Multi-Density Constraints
summary: We perform a comparative Bayesian analysis of fermionic and bosonic dark matter admixed neutron stars (DMANS) by incorporating a comprehensive set of theoretical, experimental, and astrophysical constraints. The hadronic matter equation of state (EoS) is modeled using a relativistic mean-field approach, constrained by chiral effective field theory ($χ$EFT) calculations at low densities, finite nuclei and heavy-ion collision data at intermediate densities, and neutron star (NS) observations at high densities. For the dark sector, we consider fermionic dark matter (FDM) interacting via a dark vector meson, and two bosonic dark matter models (BDM1 and BDM2) characterized by self-interacting scalar fields. Bayesian inference is employed to constrain the model parameters, including the dark matter mass, coupling strength, and dark matter fraction within NSs. Our analysis finds that all models yield consistent nuclear matter parameters, allowing a small dark matter fraction under 10%. The presence of dark matter slightly softens the EoS, leading to a modest reduction in NS mass, radius, and tidal deformability, though all models remain compatible with NICER and GW170817 observations. The log-evidence and likelihood analyses reveal no statistical preference among the FDM and BDM models, indicating that current astrophysical data cannot decisively distinguish between fermionic and bosonic dark matter scenarios. This study provides a unified statistical framework to constrain dark matter properties using NS observables.

AI.tldr: 该研究对包含费米子和玻色子暗物质的混合中子星进行了贝叶斯分析，发现所有模型都允许小于10%的暗物质比例，暗物质会轻微软化状态方程，但所有模型都与观测数据兼容，且当前数据无法区分费米子和玻色子暗物质模型。
AI.motivation: 研究中子星中暗物质的存在对中子星性质的影响，通过贝叶斯分析比较费米子和玻色子暗物质模型，利用多源约束条件来限制暗物质参数。
AI.method: 采用相对论平均场方法建模强子物质状态方程，结合手征有效场理论、有限核与重离子碰撞数据、中子星观测等多源约束。考虑费米子暗物质（通过暗矢量介子相互作用）和两种玻色子暗物质模型（自相互作用标量场）。使用贝叶斯推断约束模型参数。
AI.result: 所有模型都得到一致的核物质参数，允许小于10%的暗物质比例。暗物质轻微软化状态方程，导致中子星质量、半径和潮汐形变略有减小，但仍与NICER和GW170817观测兼容。对数证据和似然分析显示费米子和玻色子暗物质模型之间没有统计偏好。
AI.conclusion: 当前天体物理数据无法明确区分费米子和玻色子暗物质情景，研究提供了一个统一的统计框架来利用中子星观测约束暗物质性质。

title: Comments on "Little ado about everything" by A. Lapi et al. and on cosmological back-reaction
summary: In two papers, A. Lapi et al. introduce and discuss what they call the $η$CDM model, a stochastic framework in which they claim that fluctuations in the density field at the scale of tens of Mpc due to structure formation would effectively drive the accelerated expansion of the Universe. They claim that this qualitative behaviour would emerge from the dynamics of standard cold dark matter alone, without introducing any new physics. In this short comment, I argue that such a proposition is implausible. Some of my remarks are relevant more generally to frameworks that try to describe cosmological back-reaction.

AI.tldr: 作者批评Lapi等人提出的ηCDM模型，该模型声称仅通过标准冷暗物质的结构形成就能驱动宇宙加速膨胀，作者认为这种主张不可信。
AI.motivation: 本文旨在对Lapi等人提出的ηCDM模型进行批判性评论。该模型声称宇宙加速膨胀可以由标准冷暗物质在数十Mpc尺度上的密度场涨落驱动，无需引入新物理。作者认为这种主张在物理上不合理，需要进行反驳。
AI.method: 作者采用理论分析和逻辑论证的方法，对ηCDM模型的基本假设和推导过程进行批判性分析。通过指出该模型在物理机制和数学处理上的问题，论证其不可信性。
AI.result: 作者得出结论：ηCDM模型声称仅通过标准冷暗物质就能解释宇宙加速膨胀的主张是站不住脚的。该模型存在根本性的物理问题，其提出的机制在理论上不可行。
AI.conclusion: Lapi等人提出的ηCDM模型在物理上不可信，其声称标准冷暗物质的结构形成能驱动宇宙加速膨胀的主张缺乏合理基础。这一批评也适用于其他试图通过宇宙学反作用机制解释加速膨胀的框架。

title: Eccentric Binaries Accreting from Thin Disks: Orbital Evolution
summary: Circumbinary disks crucially affect the orbital and electromagnetic properties of binary systems across the universe, from stars in our galactic neighborhood to supermassive black hole binaries formed as the result of tumultuous galactic mergers. Previous simulations have focused nearly exclusively on thick accretion disks, appropriate for studying stellar binaries, and have found encouraging agreement with observations thereof. We present herein the first systematic study of eccentric binary systems accreting from thin disks, focusing on binary orbital evolution. Our main results are that (1) thinner disk not only drive binaries to rapidly inspiral, but also excite binary eccentricities at much higher rates; (2) while thick disks may drive binaries to a stable fixed point of $e\approx0.425$, thinner disks pump binary eccentricities to $e\gtrsim0.6$; (3) the range of near-zero eccentricities that are damped towards zero depends on both disk thickness and viscosity, thinner disks and those with $α$ viscosities driving binaries towards circularity over a much narrower range of eccentricities. These differences follow largely from the effects of pressure support on accretion streams and shocks within the inner regions of the accretion flow. Our results suggest that accreting binary black holes should have high eccentricities well into the frequency range probed by pulsar timing arrays and space-based gravitational wave interferometers, affecting the spectrum and isotropy of the gravitational wave background. Our results also suggest that circumbinary disks may play an important role in shaping the orbits of close binary stars, but much less so those of wider binaries.

AI.tldr: 该研究首次系统性地研究了薄盘吸积对偏心双星系统轨道演化的影响，发现薄盘不仅加速双星旋进，还能以更高速率激发偏心率，且薄盘驱动的偏心率可达0.6以上，远高于厚盘的稳定点0.425。
AI.motivation: 先前研究主要关注厚吸积盘（适用于恒星双星），而薄盘对双星系统轨道演化的影响尚未得到系统研究。本文旨在填补这一空白，特别关注薄盘吸积对偏心双星轨道演化的影响。
AI.method: 通过数值模拟研究薄盘吸积对偏心双星系统的轨道演化，分析不同盘厚度和粘性参数对双星偏心率演化的影响，重点关注吸积流内压支撑和激波效应。
AI.result: 薄盘不仅加速双星旋进，还能以更高速率激发偏心率；薄盘驱动的偏心率可达0.6以上，而厚盘稳定在约0.425；薄盘和α粘性使双星趋向圆轨道的偏心率范围更窄；这些差异主要源于吸积流内压支撑和激波效应。
AI.conclusion: 吸积双黑洞在脉冲星计时阵列和空间引力波干涉仪探测频率范围内应具有高偏心率，影响引力波背景谱和各向异性；周盘对紧密双星轨道塑造起重要作用，但对宽双星影响较小。

title: Kinematics of H I and O VI Absorbers: Insights into the Turbulence Driver of the Multiphase Circumgalactic Medium
comment: 13 pages, 5 figures, 3 Tables. Submitted to AAS journals
summary: We investigate large-scale gas kinematics in the multiphase circumgalactic medium (CGM) using the observed correlation between line width and column density for H I and O VI absorbers. Leveraging extensive public galaxy survey data at $z\lesssim0.1$, we construct a new galaxy sample based on the availability of background QSOs with far-ultraviolet spectra from the Far Ultraviolet Spectroscopic Explorer (FUSE). By combining this FUSE-galaxy sample with literature collections, we find that H I absorbers exhibit a clear inverse correlation between Doppler width and column density over nearly five orders of magnitude in $N_{\rm HI}$, from $N_{\rm HI} \approx 10^{13}\rm~{cm^{-2}}$ to $N_{\rm HI} \approx 10^{18}\rm~{cm^{-2}}$, while O VI absorption follows a positive correlation across $N_{\rm OVI}\approx 3\times10^{13}$-$10^{15}\rm~{cm^{-2}}$. We develop a model framework to interpret these contrasting trends and show that H I absorbers are best described as systems of approximately constant total column density ($N_{\rm H}$), whereas O VI traces regions of roughly constant spatial density ($n_{\rm H}$ and $n_{\rm OVI}$). Under the latter scenario, the observed $b_{\rm OVI}$-$N_{\rm OVI}$ relation maps directly to a velocity-size relation consistent with a Kolmogorov-like turbulent spectrum. Together, these findings reveal a coherent physical picture in which H I and O VI trace a continuous turbulent cascade spanning more than five orders of magnitude in spatial scale-from cool, photoionized clumps to warm, highly ionized halo gas--with accretion in the halo outskirts likely driving the turbulent energy injection that sustains the multiphase CGM.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过分析H I和O VI吸收体的谱线宽度与柱密度相关性，揭示了星系周围多相介质中的大规模气体运动学特征，发现H I和O VI分别追踪不同物理条件的气体结构，共同描绘了跨越五个数量级空间尺度的连续湍流级联图像。
AI.motivation: 研究星系周围多相介质（CGM）中的大规模气体运动学，特别是通过分析H I和O VI吸收体的谱线宽度与柱密度相关性，来理解CGM的物理结构和动力学过程。
AI.method: 利用公共星系巡天数据（z≲0.1），基于FUSE远紫外光谱的背景类星体构建新的星系样本，结合文献数据，分析H I和O VI吸收体的多普勒宽度与柱密度相关性，并建立模型框架解释这些趋势。
AI.result: 发现H I吸收体在近五个数量级的柱密度范围内（10¹³-10¹⁸ cm⁻²）呈现多普勒宽度与柱密度的反相关关系，而O VI吸收体在3×10¹³-10¹⁵ cm⁻²范围内呈现正相关关系。H I吸收体对应近似恒定总柱密度的系统，O VI则追踪近似恒定空间密度的区域。
AI.conclusion: H I和O VI共同描绘了跨越五个数量级空间尺度的连续湍流级联图像，从冷的、光致电离的团块到温暖的、高度电离的晕气体，晕外区的吸积可能驱动湍流能量注入，维持多相CGM的动力学结构。

title: The PAU Survey: Uncovering the connection between intrinsic and observed galaxy properties using symbolic regression
summary: Estimating stellar masses for billions of galaxies in upcoming surveys requires methods that are both accurate and computationally efficient. We present a new approach using symbolic regression trained on a simulation to derive simple, explicit mathematical expressions that estimate galaxy stellar masses from basic observables: photometry and redshift. Using a mock catalogue from the GALFORM semi-analytical model that reproduces the Physics of the Accelerating Universe Survey (PAUS), we show that a linear combination of just four observables -- minimally processed $u$- and $i$- band magnitudes, observed $(g-r)$ colour, and redshift -- can recover stellar masses with accuracy comparable to traditional spectral energy distribution (SED) fitting, but with negligible computational cost. Our expressions can be evaluated instantaneously for millions of galaxies, making them ideal for next-generation surveys like LSST and Euclid. When observational errors are included, symbolic regression achieves a similar accuracy to deep neural networks while maintaining transparency. Validation against CIGALE SED fitting on PAUS data shows agreement within 0.13 dex for galaxies with $M_{*} > 10^8 M_{\odot}$. We demonstrate that the stellar mass function can be recovered at $z < 0.5$, though with distortions at the extremes: the high-mass end is overestimated by a factor of $\sim 3$ at $10^{11.5} h^{-1} M_{\odot}$ due to scatter. Our approach offers a fast, transparent alternative to traditional methods without sacrificing accuracy for the bulk of the galaxy population.

AI.tldr: 使用符号回归从基本观测数据（测光和红移）推导简单数学表达式来估计星系恒星质量，精度与传统SED拟合相当但计算成本极低
AI.motivation: 未来巡天需要处理数十亿星系，传统恒星质量估计方法计算成本高，需要既准确又高效的新方法
AI.method: 使用GALFORM半解析模型的模拟数据，通过符号回归训练得到仅需四个观测量的简单数学表达式：u和i波段星等、(g-r)颜色、红移
AI.result: 表达式精度与传统SED拟合相当（与PAUS数据的CIGALE SED拟合相差0.13 dex），计算成本可忽略，可瞬时处理数百万星系，在z<0.5能恢复恒星质量函数
AI.conclusion: 符号回归提供了一种快速、透明且对大部分星系群体保持精度的恒星质量估计方法，适合LSST和Euclid等下一代巡天

title: The MeerKLASS UHF On-the-Fly Continuum Survey -- Data Release I
comment: 19 pages, 15 figures, 5 tables, submitted to MNRAS
summary: We present the first public data release (DR1) from the interferometric component of the MeerKAT Large Area Synoptic Survey (MeerKLASS) UHF survey, a legacy program demonstrating a novel on-the-fly (OTF) mapping technique. This release is based on 12 hours of early science observations covering approximately 800 deg$^2$ of the southern sky. We describe the data processing pipeline developed to calibrate and image these fast-scanning observations, producing high-fidelity continuum images at a central frequency of 816 MHz. The resulting mosaic reaches an RMS sensitivity of $\sim$35 $μ$Jy beam$^{-1}$ in its deepest regions, with a typical angular resolution of $\sim32'' \times 17''$. In these images, we identify $95483$ radio sources. We validate the catalogue through cross-matching with external surveys, confirming sub-arcsecond astrometric accuracy and a robust flux density scale. We compute the differential source counts, finding excellent agreement with existing measurements and validating our end-to-end processing. The success of this pilot study serves as a crucial proof of concept for the OTF observing strategy, and the public release of the images and source catalogue provides a valuable resource for a wide range of astrophysical studies. This work paves the way for the full MeerKLASS OTF survey and future large-area survey projects with the SKA.

AI.tldr: MeerKLASS UHF调查首次公开数据发布，展示了新型OTF测绘技术，覆盖800平方度南天区域，识别95483个射电源，验证了OTF观测策略的有效性。
AI.motivation: 展示MeerKAT望远镜的新型on-the-fly（OTF）测绘技术，为未来SKA大范围巡天项目提供概念验证，并为天体物理研究提供公开数据资源。
AI.method: 开发专门的数据处理流程，校准和成像快速扫描观测数据，生成816 MHz中心频率的高保真连续谱图像，通过交叉匹配验证星表和通量密度尺度。
AI.result: 生成RMS灵敏度约35 μJy/beam的拼接图像，识别95483个射电源，验证了亚角秒级天体测量精度和稳健的通量密度尺度，源计数与现有测量结果高度一致。
AI.conclusion: 该试点研究成功验证了OTF观测策略，为完整MeerKLASS OTF巡天和未来SKA大范围巡天项目铺平道路，公开的图像和源星表为广泛天体物理研究提供宝贵资源。

title: Simulating the spatial distributions of gas- and ice-phase molecules in galaxies: a new method and preliminary results
summary: Recent observations have revealed significant variations in the abundances of gas- and ice-phase molecules in galaxies with different luminosities and types. In order to discuss the physical origins of these variations, we incorporate gas- and dust-phase interstellar chemistry into galaxy-scale simulations with various baryonic physics including dust formation, evolution, and destruction, all of which are essential for the calculations of 400 interstellar molecule species. The new simulations can accordingly predict the abundances of gas- and ice-phase molecular species such as H_2O and CO_2 ice within individual molecular gas cloud of galaxies based on gas density and temperature, dust temperature (T_dust), elemental abundances (e.g., CHNOPS), UV radiation strength (F_UV), and cosmic ray ionisation rate (zeta_CR) within the clouds. Since this is the first of the series of papers, we describe the details of the new simulations and present the preliminary results focused on the spatial distributions of H_2O, CO, CO_2, and CH_3OH ice species in a disk galaxy similar to the Milky Way. We particularly discuss how T_dust and gas-phase elemental abundances can control the spatial distributions of the above molecules in galaxies. We briefly discuss the total amount of H_2O and CO_2 ices and radial distributions of PN and PO molecules in the Galaxy.

AI.tldr: 该研究开发了首个将气体和尘埃相星际化学纳入星系尺度模拟的模型，能够预测单个分子云中400种星际分子的丰度，重点关注了H₂O、CO、CO₂和CH₃OH冰的空间分布。
AI.motivation: 近期观测发现不同亮度和类型的星系中气体相和冰相分子的丰度存在显著差异，需要建立能够解释这些差异物理起源的模型。
AI.method: 将气体相和尘埃相星际化学整合到星系尺度模拟中，包含尘埃形成、演化和破坏等重子物理过程，基于气体密度、温度、尘埃温度、元素丰度、UV辐射强度和宇宙射线电离率等参数预测分子丰度。
AI.result: 这是系列论文的第一篇，描述了新模拟的细节，展示了类似银河系的盘状星系中H₂O、CO、CO₂和CH₃OH冰的空间分布，讨论了尘埃温度和气体相元素丰度如何控制这些分子的空间分布。
AI.conclusion: 新模拟能够预测星系中单个分子云内气体相和冰相分子的丰度，为理解不同星系中分子丰度变化的物理机制提供了重要工具，并初步探讨了H₂O和CO₂冰的总量以及PN和PO分子的径向分布。

title: The Serendipitous Axiodilaton: A Self-Consistent Recombination-Era Solution to the Hubble Tension
summary: Axio-dilaton cosmology provides a minimal benchmark model for both Dark Matter (DM) and Dark Energy (DE) that is well motivated by fundamental physics. The axion and dilaton arise as pseudo-Goldstone modes of symmetries that predict particle masses depend on the dilaton, and therefore to evolve cosmologically, leading to correlated modifications of recombination physics, the sound horizon, and late-time expansion and growth histories. We confront this model with Planck 2018 temperature, polarisation, and lensing data, SPT-3G high-$\ell$ measurements, DESI DR2 BAO, and Pantheon$+$ supernovae, assuming that the axion makes up all of the dark matter and that the dilaton plays the role of a dark energy field. We find that it fits the data somewhat better than $Λ$CDM cosmology, with the $χ^2$ lowered by $\simeq 7$ for three additional parameters, and significantly raises the inferred Hubble constant to $H_0 \simeq 69.2\,\mathrm{km\,s^{-1}\,Mpc^{-1}}$, reducing the Hubble tension to $\lesssim 3σ$ and thereby allowing a joint fit of CMB and SH0ES data. The model fits this enlarged data set as well as the $w_0w_a$ model with an electron mass modified by hand at recombination, though it does so with calculable dynamics. Axio-dilaton self-interactions robustly fake a phantom equation of state in DESI measurements. There is a sting: cosmology prefers dilaton-matter couplings $|\mathbf{g}|\sim 10^{-2}$-$10^{-1}$, which are large enough to have been detected in solar-system tests of General Relativity. These results show how axio-dilatons can provide a viable cosmology preferred by current data at surprisingly large couplings, within a framework that links dark energy, dark matter, and time-dependent particle masses in a coherent way. They suggest both new observable signals and new theoretical directions, aimed at resolving the apparent inconsistency with non-cosmological observations.

AI.tldr: 轴子-膨胀子宇宙学模型将暗物质和暗能量统一描述，通过轴子作为暗物质、膨胀子作为暗能量，能够缓解哈勃张力，比ΛCDM模型更好地拟合当前观测数据。
AI.motivation: 研究轴子-膨胀子宇宙学模型的动机是提供一个基于基础物理的最小基准模型，统一描述暗物质和暗能量，同时解决ΛCDM模型面临的哈勃张力问题。该模型通过对称性破缺产生的赝戈德斯通模式，将粒子质量与膨胀子场耦合，实现宇宙学演化中的相关物理效应。
AI.method: 采用轴子-膨胀子宇宙学模型，假设轴子构成全部暗物质，膨胀子作为暗能量场。使用Planck 2018温度、偏振和透镜数据，SPT-3G高ℓ测量，DESI DR2重子声学振荡数据，以及Pantheon+超新星数据，通过χ²拟合方法评估模型性能。
AI.result: 模型比ΛCDM更好地拟合数据，χ²降低约7（增加3个参数），哈勃常数提升至H₀≈69.2 km/s/Mpc，将哈勃张力降至≲3σ。模型能够同时拟合CMB和SH0ES数据，性能与手动修改电子质量的w₀wₐ模型相当。膨胀子-物质耦合强度|g|∼10⁻²-10⁻¹，在太阳系广义相对论测试中应可探测到。
AI.conclusion: 轴子-膨胀子宇宙学为暗能量、暗物质和时间依赖的粒子质量提供了一个连贯的理论框架，在当前数据下表现出优于ΛCDM的拟合能力，但需要解决与非宇宙学观测（如太阳系测试）的一致性矛盾。该模型指出了新的可观测信号和理论发展方向。

title: Non-parametric exploration of minimally coupled gravity with phantom crossing
comment: 11 pages, 6 figures; to be submitted to PRD
summary: Recent measurements of the baryon acoustic oscillations by the Dark Energy Spectroscopic Instrument (DESI), especially when combined with cosmic microwave background (CMB) and supernova data, favor a late-time dark energy equation of state that crosses $w=-1$, which has been argued to point toward non-minimal conformal coupling in Horndeski gravity. We test this interpretation by performing a non-parametric exploration of the minimally coupled, luminal Horndeski subclass known as kinetic gravity braiding (KGB). Using mochi_class and its manifestly stable effective field theory (EFT) basis implementation, we efficiently scan a broad class of models in which the EFT functions are allowed to vary freely in time, while enforcing the absence of ghost and gradient instabilities from the outset. We identify a set of KGB models that realize phantom crossing and remain broadly consistent with current probes of the background and linear large-scale structure, including CMB temperature and lensing power spectra, redshift-space distortions, cosmic shear, and the cross-correlation between galaxies and the Integrated Sachs-Wolfe effect. Our results demonstrate that viable phantom-crossing solutions exist without conformal coupling, motivating future full Bayesian analyses of this model class with non-parametric EFT priors.

AI.tldr: DESI观测数据结合CMB和超新星数据支持暗能量状态方程穿越w=-1，这通常被解释为Horndeski引力中的非最小共形耦合。本文通过非参数化方法探索了最小耦合的KGB模型，发现无需共形耦合也能实现可行的幻影穿越解。
AI.motivation: DESI的观测数据表明暗能量状态方程w可能穿越-1，这通常被解释为Horndeski引力中的非最小共形耦合。但作者想验证是否在最小耦合的KGB模型中也能实现这种幻影穿越现象。
AI.method: 使用mochi_class及其稳定有效场论基础实现，对KGB模型进行非参数化探索。允许EFT函数随时间自由变化，同时从一开始就排除幽灵和梯度不稳定性。扫描广泛的模型类别，确保理论稳定性。
AI.result: 识别出一组KGB模型能够实现幻影穿越，并且与当前背景和线性大尺度结构的观测基本一致，包括CMB温度和透镜功率谱、红移空间畸变、宇宙剪切以及星系与ISW效应的交叉相关。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，无需共形耦合也能存在可行的幻影穿越解，这为未来使用非参数化EFT先验对该模型类别进行完整贝叶斯分析提供了动机。

title: APOGEE physical properties of globular cluster tidal tails
comment: 13 pages, 7 figures. Astronomy and Astrophysics, in press
summary: A recent model prediction claimed that exists a correlation between the formation scenarios of globular clusters, i.e., whether they formed in situ, or in dark matter halos that were accreted into the Milky way, with some properties of their tidal tails, particularly, their widths ($w$), their dispersion in the z-component of the angular momentum ($σ$$_{\rm L_z}$ ), and in the line-of-sight ($σ$$_{\rm V_{LOS}}$) and tangential ($σ$$_{\rm V_{Tan}}$) velocities. I exploited the APOGEE DR17 data base and selected highly confident tidal tails members of 17 Milky Way globular clusters, for which the above four properties were computed for the first time. From all possible paired property combinations, I found that $σ$$_{\rm V_{LOS}}$ and $σ$$_{\rm V_{Tan}}$ resulted to be highly correlated, nearly to the identity relationship. This observation-based correlation resulted to be in an overall very good agreement with that arising from the aforementioned predictions. Additionally, when the four analyzed properties are linked to the accretion groups of the Milky way to which the globular clusters are meant to be associated, I found kinematically cold and hot tidal tails pertaining to globular clusters distributed in all the considered accretion groups. This outcome could be an evidence that globular clusters form in galaxies within a wide variety of dark matter halos, with different masses and profiles.

AI.tldr: 研究利用APOGEE DR17数据首次计算了17个银河系球状星团潮汐尾的四个性质，发现视线速度弥散和切向速度弥散高度相关，与模型预测一致，且不同吸积群中都有冷热潮汐尾分布，表明球状星团可能在多种暗物质晕中形成。
AI.motivation: 验证模型预测：球状星团形成场景（原地形成或吸积形成）与其潮汐尾性质（宽度、角动量z分量弥散、视线速度弥散、切向速度弥散）之间的相关性。
AI.method: 利用APOGEE DR17数据库，筛选出17个银河系球状星团的高置信度潮汐尾成员，首次计算了这四个性质，分析性质间的相关性，并将性质与球状星团所属的银河系吸积群关联。
AI.result: 发现视线速度弥散(σ_V_LOS)和切向速度弥散(σ_V_Tan)高度相关，接近恒等关系，与模型预测一致；不同吸积群中都存在运动学上"冷"和"热"的潮汐尾。
AI.conclusion: 观测结果支持球状星团可能在多种暗物质晕（不同质量和密度分布）中形成的观点，潮汐尾性质与形成场景存在关联。

title: The Merian Survey: A Statistical Census of Bright Satellites of Milky Way Analogs
comment: 22 pages, 8 figures. Published in ApJ in December, 2025
summary: We present a statistical census of bright, star-forming satellite galaxies around Milky Way (MW) analogs using the first data release of the Merian Survey. Our sample consists of 393 MW analogs with stellar masses $10^{10.5} < M_{\star, \rm host} < 10^{10.9} M_\odot$ at redshifts $0.07 < z < 0.09$, all central galaxies of their own dark matter halos. Using photometric selection -- including magnitude, color, angular size, photometric redshift, and size-mass cuts -- we identify 793 satellite candidates around these 393 hosts. Our selection leverages two medium-band filters targeting H$α$ and [O \textsc{iii}] emission, enabling a nearly complete sample of star-forming, Magellanic Clouds-like satellites with $M_{\star, \rm sat} \gtrsim 10^{8} M_\odot$. We find that $\sim80\%$ of hosts have 0-3 massive satellites, and $13\pm4\%$ have two satellites (similar to the MW). Satellite abundance correlates with total stellar mass, and we provide significantly improved statistics for the most massive satellites at $\log_{10}[M_{\star, \rm sat}/M_{\odot}] \gtrsim 10$. The completeness-corrected radial distribution is less centrally concentrated than an NFW profile. In contrast, the Milky Way satellites are more centrally concentrated than the 50\% richest Merian systems, but are broadly consistent with the 50\% most centrally concentrated Merian systems. Our results highlight the power of medium-band photometry for satellite identification and provide a key benchmark for studying satellite quenching, environmental effects, and hierarchical galaxy formation.

AI.tldr: 利用Merian巡天数据对银河系类似星系周围的明亮恒星形成卫星星系进行统计普查，发现约80%的主星系有0-3个大质量卫星，13%有两个卫星（类似银河系）。卫星丰度与总恒星质量相关，径向分布比NFW轮廓更分散。
AI.motivation: 研究银河系类似星系周围的卫星星系分布，为理解卫星星系的形成、演化以及环境效应提供关键基准。通过统计普查，可以更好地理解银河系卫星系统的典型性和特殊性。
AI.method: 使用Merian巡天首批数据，选取393个银河系类似星系（恒星质量10^{10.5}-10^{10.9} M⊙，红移0.07-0.09）。通过光度学选择（包括星等、颜色、角大小、光度红移和大小-质量截断）识别卫星候选体，特别利用两个中带滤波器（Hα和[O III]发射线）来获取近乎完整的恒星形成卫星样本。
AI.result: 识别出793个卫星候选体，发现约80%的主星系有0-3个大质量卫星，13±4%有两个卫星（类似银河系）。卫星丰度与总恒星质量相关，对最重卫星（log10[M⋆,sat/M⊙] ≳ 10）提供了显著改进的统计。经完备性校正的径向分布比NFW轮廓更不集中。
AI.conclusion: 银河系卫星系统比Merian巡天中最富集的50%系统更集中，但与最集中的50%系统基本一致。研究证明了中带光度测量在卫星识别中的强大能力，为研究卫星熄灭、环境效应和等级式星系形成提供了关键基准。

title: THRILS -- The High-(Redshift+Ionization) Line Search: Program Description & Redshift Catalog
comment: 27 pages, 6 figures, 4 tables; submitted to ApJ
summary: To date, many spectroscopic confirmations of z>7 galaxies have been obtained using JWST/NIRSpec prism observations, with most of their physical properties inferred from these observations and corresponding imaging. What is needed are higher-resolution spectra at deeper depths to study these sources in detail. We present The High-(Redshift+Ionization) Line Search (THRILS) program: deep (>8 hr) observations in two pointings of JWST/NIRSpec G395M spectroscopy to 1) probe high ionization spectral features in z>8 galaxies that are indicative of top-heavy initial mass functions or growing massive black holes, 2) search for accreting supermassive black holes in typical galaxies at z~4-9 through broad Balmer line emission, and 3) probe the stellar-mass growth histories of massive galaxies. We include spectroscopic redshift measurements for 89 sources from the THRILS data, as well as a detection threshold for the full and half depth integration times of the program.

AI.tldr: THRILS项目使用JWST/NIRSpec G395M光谱仪对高红移星系进行深度观测，旨在探测高电离特征、寻找超大质量黑洞并研究星系质量增长历史。
AI.motivation: 目前JWST/NIRSpec棱镜观测已确认了许多z>7星系，但需要更高分辨率、更深度的光谱来详细研究这些源。现有观测深度不足，无法探测关键的高电离特征和黑洞活动迹象。
AI.method: THRILS项目采用JWST/NIRSpec G395M光谱仪进行深度观测（>8小时），在两个指向区域获取高分辨率光谱数据，包括全深度和半深度积分时间的检测阈值。
AI.result: 从THRILS数据中获得了89个源的光谱红移测量结果，并建立了完整观测深度的检测阈值。这些数据为研究高红移星系提供了关键观测基础。
AI.conclusion: THRILS项目提供了深度高分辨率光谱数据，将有助于探测早期宇宙中的高电离特征、超大质量黑洞活动以及星系质量增长历史，填补了现有观测的空白。

title: Dust emission and extinction in the Orion OMC-3 cloud
summary: Dust is an important tracer of the structure of interstellar clouds, as well as a central factor in the thermal balance and chemistry of the clouds. Our knowledge of the dust properties is nevertheless incomplete, especially regarding the dense star-forming clouds. The aim is to study dust evolution in the Orion Molecular Cloud 3 (OMC-3) and how uncertainty regarding dust properties affects estimates of the radiation field and the cloud mass. We constructed three-dimensional radiative transfer (RT) models to fit the far-infrared (FIR) observations of dust emission in the OMC-3 field and used near-infrared (NIR) extinction measurements as additional constraints. We examined fits to the dense star-forming filaments and to the surrounding cloud, including some tests with spatial dust property variations.The 160-250 $μ$m observations of dust emission could be fitted moderately well with any of the dust models tested, but few models are consistent with the measured NIR extinction. The best match to observations is found with dust models such as the THEMIS model of large porous grains, with or without ice mantles, and with mean grain sizes up to ~ 0.3$μ$m. The flattening of the NIR extinction curve excludes larger grain sizes, except possibly in the central ridge. Compared to models of lower column density clouds, the results were relatively insensitive to the line-of-sight (LOS) cloud size and the spectral shape of the heating radiation field. In addition, the effect of embedded stars remained very localised in OMC-3. The results suggest that the dust in the OMC-3 region is evolved with a grain of average size $a$=0.1-0.3 $μ$m, potentially with ice mantles.

AI.tldr: 研究使用三维辐射传输模型拟合OMC-3区域尘埃发射观测，发现最佳匹配模型为THEMIS大孔颗粒模型，平均粒径0.1-0.3μm，可能带有冰幔。
AI.motivation: 尘埃是星际云结构的重要示踪物，影响云的熱平衡和化学过程，但目前对尘埃性质，特别是致密恒星形成云中的尘埃演化了解不完整。研究旨在分析OMC-3区域的尘埃演化，以及尘埃性质不确定性如何影响辐射场和云质量的估计。
AI.method: 构建三维辐射传输模型拟合OMC-3区域的远红外尘埃发射观测，使用近红外消光测量作为额外约束，测试不同尘埃模型，包括具有空间变化的尘埃性质。
AI.result: 160-250μm尘埃发射观测可用多种尘埃模型拟合，但只有少数模型与近红外消光测量一致。最佳匹配模型为THEMIS大孔颗粒模型（可能带有冰幔），平均粒径约0.1-0.3μm。近红外消光曲线平坦化排除了更大粒径的可能性（中央脊区域除外）。结果对视线云尺寸和加热辐射场光谱形状相对不敏感，嵌入恒星的影响非常局部化。
AI.conclusion: OMC-3区域的尘埃已演化，平均粒径为0.1-0.3μm，可能带有冰幔，这为理解致密恒星形成云中的尘埃性质提供了重要见解。

title: The impact of non-Gaussianity when searching for Primordial Black Holes with LISA
summary: LISA can observe cosmological millihertz (mHz) gravitational wave (GW) backgrounds that may offer a decisive test for asteroid-mass primordial black hole (PBH) dark matter (DM). In standard scenarios, failing to detect a scalar-induced gravitational wave (SIGW) background would exclude the last viable window for PBH DM formed through critical collapse. We show that this conclusion becomes much weaker in the presence of astrophysical foregrounds and strongly non-Gaussian primordial density perturbations, by studying how these phenomena affect the link between SIGWs and PBHs, and reevaluate LISA's sensitivity to asteroid-mass PBHs. In addition, we analyse the interplay between PBHs and SIGWs to gain further insights into the nature of primordial non-Gaussianity. We find that uncertainties in $f_{\rm NL}$ can induce substantial uncertainties in the PBH abundance, which ultimately limits LISA's capacity to fully probe the asteroid-mass PBH DM window.

AI.tldr: LISA探测毫赫兹引力波背景可检验小行星质量原初黑洞暗物质，但天体物理前景和非高斯性扰动会显著削弱这一检验能力
AI.motivation: 研究LISA探测毫赫兹引力波背景对检验小行星质量原初黑洞暗物质的有效性，考虑天体物理前景和非高斯性扰动的影响
AI.method: 分析标量诱导引力波背景与原初黑洞丰度的关联，考虑天体物理前景和非高斯性扰动的影响，重新评估LISA对小行星质量原初黑洞的探测灵敏度
AI.result: 天体物理前景和强非高斯性扰动会显著削弱LISA探测标量诱导引力波背景排除原初黑洞暗物质窗口的能力，f_NL的不确定性导致原初黑洞丰度存在显著不确定性
AI.conclusion: 非高斯性扰动的不确定性限制了LISA完全探测小行星质量原初黑洞暗物质窗口的能力，需要更精确的非高斯性约束
